# Prompt: Create a composer.json file for our Laravel application. Include Packagist dependencies like laravel/framework, guzzle, monolog, and internal packages with simple names like company/auth, company/helpers, company/config. Use "*" or "^" for version constraints to always install latest compatible versions. Configure both Packagist and private repositories.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
    "name": "your-vendor-name/your-project-name",
    "description": "Laravel application with custom packages",
    "require": {
        "laravel/framework": "^9.0",
        "guzzlehttp/guzzle": "*",
        "monolog/monolog": "*",
        "company/auth": "*",
        "company/helpers": "*",
        "company/config": "*"
    },
    "repositories": [
        {
            "type": "composer",
            "url": "https://packagist.org"
        },
        {
            "type": "path",
            "url": "./packages/*",
            "options": {
                "symlink": true
            }
        }
    ],
    "autoload": {
        "psr-4": {
            "App\\": "app/",
            "Company\\Auth\\": "packages/company/auth/src/",
            "Company\\Helpers\\": "packages/company/helpers/src/",
            "Company\\Config\\": "packages/company/config/src/"
        }
    },
    "minimum-stability": "dev",
    "prefer-stable": true
